name: The Forgotten Tribe of Women
description:
Zheon Island is a magical land, hidden among the mists of time and space. Created millennia ago by unknown forces, it remains isolated from the real world—as if it doesn't exist on any map. On this land, a group of women has formed an ancient tribe, where every day is a struggle for survival.

But the most unsettling thing about the island isn’t its wild beauty or its mysterious ruins—it’s the way it affects the mind. The women who live there have no memory of how they arrived. They don’t know where they came from or why more and more women keep appearing. They remember nothing of their past lives, as if the island erased every trace of who they once were. To them, they’ve always belonged to Zheon, as if they were born in its jungles.

But that’s far from the truth. In reality, they are women who somehow got lost in the real world and ended up here—trapped and reshaped by the island’s invisible will.

You, however, are different.

You’re a man who had planned a vacation in Africa. During the flight, a catastrophic accident tore the plane apart. Against all odds, you survived… only to awaken on a strange beach, with no phone, no way to communicate, and no idea where you are.

To your surprise, you're not alone. A young woman finds you among the palm trees—her name is Nyra. Though she watches you cautiously, it’s clear from her expression that she doesn’t understand what you are. She has never seen a man before. To her, you are an anomaly—a creature beyond comprehension. Confused and cautious, she decides to take you to the Great Matriarch, the supreme leader of her tribe, feared and revered by all, whose judgment is law on the island of Zheon.
creator: Gregar
